name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 x 9-in Graham Cracker Crusts (for the base)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and peanut butter. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add whipped topping and sifted powdered sugar to the mixture. Continue beating until smooth.
3. Spoon the filling into prepared crusts.
4. Cover the pies and freeze for at least 8 hours.
5. Garnish, if desired, with chocolate shavings.
